description: Monitoring vLLM Inference Server with PD (prefill/decode) support

panels.description: End to end request latency measured in seconds.

targets.expr: sum by(role) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_sum{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(role) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_count{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: E2E Request Latency

panels.description: Number of tokens processed per second
panels.title: Token Throughput

panels.description: Number of requests in RUNNING and WAITING state
panels.title: Scheduler State

panels.description: P50, P90, P95, and P99 TTFT latency in seconds.

targets.expr: sum by(role) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_sum{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(role) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_count{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Time To First Token Latency

panels.description: Percentage of used cache blocks by vLLM.
panels.title: Cache Utilization

panels.description: Number of finished requests by finish reason (EOS/max_len).
panels.title: Finish Reason

targets.expr: sum by (role) (rate(vllm:request_queue_time_seconds_sum{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (role) (rate(vllm:request_queue_time_seconds_count{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (role) (rate(vllm:request_prefill_time_seconds_sum{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (role) (rate(vllm:request_prefill_time_seconds_count{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (role) (rate(vllm:request_decode_time_seconds_sum{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (role) (rate(vllm:request_decode_time_seconds_count{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (role) (rate(vllm:request_max_num_generation_tokens_sum{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (role) (rate(vllm:request_max_num_generation_tokens_count{model_name="$model_name", role=~"$node_role"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Avg Max Generation Tokens per Request

panels.description: Prefill vs Decode throughput breakdown by role
panels.title: Token Throughput by Role

panels.description: Rate of requests with > 500 generation tokens on decode instance
panels.title: Long Request Rate (Decode)

panels.description: Number of preemptions per second by role
panels.title: Preemption Rate by Role

panels.description: Correlation between Long Request Rate and Decode ITL
panels.title: Long Request Rate vs Decode ITL

panels.description: Rate of KV buffer overflows on decode instance
panels.title: KV Buffer Overflows (Decode)

panels.description: Rate of KV transfer failures on decode instance
panels.title: KV Transfer Failures (Decode)

title: vLLM PD (Prefill/Decode) Revised
